testcase.name: setUp

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Could not create a session: The Safari instance is already paired with a different session. Host info: host: 'Godfreys-MacBook-Pro.local', ip: '2405:9800:b550:b229:0:0:0:2%en0' Build info: version: '4.16.1', revision: '9b4c83354e' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '26.4', java.version: '24.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.safari.SafariDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: safari}]}] Capabilities {browserName: safari}
